cases.notes: Post-deploy verification target. Same real production sample currently false-404s on 2026-04-09, but should auto-correct to the canonical ext route after the get_pdp_v2 stability fix is deployed.
Second post-deploy merchant-mismatch canary. On 2026-04-09 production this ext PDP false-404ed only when a non-canonical merchant_id was supplied, while the unscoped canonical route returned 200.
Control case. Canonical unscoped ext route should remain 200 after deploy.
Second canonical ext control. This unscoped PDP already returned 200 on 2026-04-09 production and should stay healthy after deploy.
Stable true not-found control. This real production ext id returned 404 PRODUCT_NOT_FOUND on unscoped, external_seed, and wrong-merchant probes on 2026-04-09, so it should remain 404 after deploy.

Second stable true not-found control. This production ext id also returned 404 PRODUCT_NOT_FOUND on unscoped, external_seed, and wrong-merchant probes on 2026-04-09, so it should remain 404 after deploy.

Watch sample, not a hard gate. On 2026-04-09 this real production ext PDP oscillated between client timeout and HTTP 200, so use it to inspect whether post-deploy route health and request IDs become diagnosable when the long tail reproduces.
Stable shopify-backed control sample for deploy verification.
